description_edit: Edit the artwork information and mediation texts.
description_new: Create a new artwork entry with mediation texts and image.
toast_close_blocked_generation: Cannot close: a generation (text or audio) is still in progress.
alert_visitor_desc: The visitor role (level 7) cannot create or modify an artwork.
alert_duplicate_desc: An artwork with this title already exists for this artist.
qr_empty: No QR code for this artwork yet.
analyze_init_msg: In-depth analysis in progress... Our AI models are examining the artwork details (this may take up to 45 seconds)
analyze_step_4: In-depth analysis in progress... Our Gemini 2.5 models are examining the artwork details (this may take up to 45 seconds).
analyze_progress_send: Sending to AI and analyzing the artwork…
label_source_material: Artwork description / Possible intentions of the artist
source_material_placeholder: Raw source text (curatorial notes, artistic intentions, etc.)
source_material_help: Paste your notes or catalog description here — AI will use them to generate mediations.
mediation_active_model_notice: 🚀 Analysis in progress with {{model}}… This high-quality model is performing in-depth work. It may take between 2 and 5 minutes. Please don’t close or refresh this page — we’re preparing your 8 personas!
mediation_optional_lang_limit_hint: Only 1 additional optional language is allowed
mediation_regenerate_hint_line1: If you are not satisfied with a generated mediation text,
mediation_regenerate_hint_line2: you can regenerate one persona at most
mediation_regenerate_hint_line3: You can also edit or type mediation text yourself at any time. Only one edit per persona is allowed
mediation_ai_analysis_hint: From the model’s “analysis and reflection” field. Not shown to visitors; tabs below hold persona texts.
analyze_personas_hint: Titles and descriptions returned by the AI. The text area above remains the editable source for mediation generation.
mediation_lang_toggle_selected: {{lang}} selected for generation — click again to remove
mediation_lang_help: Language shown in the fields: full generation fills all eight styles in FR, EN, DE, ES and IT. Each tab can be regenerated on its own (same five languages). You can edit each language separately.
mediation_lang_help_select: Select up to {{max}} language(s) based on your plan ({{langs}}). “Generate AI mediations” creates text only — audio is started from the AUDIO tab (plan audio language cap).
mediation_lang_help_single: AI generation: all 8 personas are produced only in {{lang}} (your interface language). Other languages remain viewable/editable if already present.
mediation_lang_help_single_optional: AI generation: all 8 personas in {{primary}}, and also in {{optional}} (optional language selected above).
mediation_lang_help_all: AI generation: all 8 personas in FR, EN, DE, ES and IT (“all languages” mode in settings).
mediation_optional_lang_admin_label: Extra languages — level 1 admin (in addition to {{primary}})
mediation_lang_help_admin_general: Administrator mode: select 1 to 4 additional languages to generate, in addition to {{primary}}.
mediation_optional_lang_hint: The primary language follows the header language selector (e.g. on the catalogue). At most one extra language.
dialog_lang_generate_desc: The “{{persona}}” persona is empty in {{lang}}. Generate all {{count}} mediations (every persona) in this language? Text already filled for other personas in {{lang}} will be kept.
dialog_lang_audio_desc: Mediation texts exist in {{lang}} but audio guides (voices F and M) are not ready yet. Start generation now?
toast_error_artist_analyze: Please select an artist before analyzing.
toast_analyze_truncated: Analysis cut off at the {{max}} token limit (Gemini cap). Raise « Max tokens » to 4096 in Settings → Image analysis, then run again.
toast_error_artist_generate: Please select an artist before generating.
toast_error_source_required: Please fill in the source material before generating.
toast_error_source_persist: Could not save source material to the database. Mediations may use outdated text.
dialog_edit_desc: Edit the artwork information and mediation texts.
dialog_new_desc: Create a new artwork entry with mediation texts and image.

audio_player.error: Audio generation failed or timed out.

audio_generate_dialog.title: Audio generation — mediation
audio_generate_dialog.desc: Track all voices by persona and language.
audio_generate_dialog.background_hint: You can close this dialog — generation will continue in the background.

audio_voice_status.label: Generated voices
audio_voice_status.retry_lang: Retry audio generation for this language
audio_voice_status.cancel_lang: Stop audio generation for this language
audio_voice_status.continue_lang: Continue audio generation for this language

qr_warn_no_expo: No exhibition assigned — the QR code will work but without exhibition context for the visitor.
mediation_lang_help_plan_range: AI generation: up to {{count}} languages included in your subscription. Choose an optional language above to enable the second language.

text_edit.unsaved_desc: You have edited the text without saving it. Do you really want to close without saving?
